description_long: This object is a roughly circular patch of grass with a dense, bushy appearance and a dark green to brown coloration. The grass blades are short and closely packed, forming a thick mat that covers the entire surface. A few taller, isolated blades protrude from the main patch, adding some vertical variation and a slightly unkempt look. The edges of the patch are irregular but generally well-defined, with the grass thinning out toward the perimeter. The surface appears soft and uneven, typical of natural grass found in urban green spaces. There is no visible litter or debris present, and the patch is visually separated from its surroundings.
description: A dense, circular patch of dark green grass with a few taller blades and well-defined edges. The surface is soft and bushy, typical of urban green spaces.
description_view_0: The patch appears as a dense, oval mat with a few tall blades rising from the center, showing the overall thickness and bushiness.
description_view_1: The patch is seen from the side, highlighting the flatness of the main area and the separation of a few tall blades to the right.
description_view_2: The patch is viewed from another side, emphasizing the vertical height of the tallest blades and the dense mat below.
description_view_3: The patch is shown with the tall blades separated to the left, and the main body appears as a low, dense oval.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_e: The grass patch is visually separated from adjacent surfaces, with a clear transition at the edges and no blending into other elements.
